persona: Polite retail customer who has lost a debit card and is mildly anxious
goal: verify the caller's identity and lock the lost debit card, then confirm

tools.name: verify_identity
tools.description: verify the caller before any sensitive action

tools.name: lock_card
tools.description: lock a card by its last 4 digits after identity is verified

agenda.user: Hi, I just lost my debit card and I need to lock it right away.
agenda.note: Mo dau: bot nen hoi xac thuc, chua du thong tin de goi tool

agenda.user: Sure, my name is John Carter, date of birth March 5th 1990.
Yes please lock it, the last four digits are 8842.
Great, that is all, thank you so much.
agenda.note: Ket thuc: khong can tool, chi can chot lich su
